# opsboard-sprint-plan

Use this skill to turn a terse product brief into a reviewable, approval-gated OPSBOARD sprint. Trigger when planning a sprint, breaking work into issues, defining acceptance criteria, building a human-approval package, or creating human gates before agents start work.

This prompt delegates to the agent skill at `../skills/opsboard-sprint-plan/`.

## Skill Location

- **Path:** `../skills/opsboard-sprint-plan/`
- **Manifest:** `../skills/opsboard-sprint-plan/SKILL.md`

## Usage

Invoke this skill by typing `/opsboard-sprint-plan` in the Copilot chat.
